mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_sales_summary (stat_date, total_revenue, order_count, visit_count, avg_usage_time) SELECT #{targetDate}, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0), /* 실제 매출로 이어지는 주문만 카운트: 결제대기(PENDING)와 주문취소(CANCELLED)는 통계에서 제외합니다. */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE ordered_at >= #{targetDate} AND ordered_at < DATE_ADD(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND status NOT IN ('PENDING', 'CANCELLED')), COUNT(id), IFNULL(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, check_in_time, check_out_time)), 0) FROM table_session /* 성능 최적화: DATE(check_out_time) 함수를 쓰지 않고 범위 검색을 사용하여 컬럼 인덱스를 태우고 빠르게 조회합니다. */ WHERE check_out_time >= #{targetDate} AND check_out_time < DATE_ADD(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND is_active = FALSE /* 이용이 완전히 종료된 데이터만 집계 */

INSERT INTO item_sales_history (stat_date, product_id, category, sales_qty, sales_amount) SELECT #{targetDate}, oi.menu_id, c.type, SUM(oi.quantity), SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity) FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN menu m ON oi.menu_id = m.id JOIN category c ON m.category_id = c.id /* 집계 조건: 1. 지정된 날짜(00:00:00 ~ 23:59:59) 내의 주문 2. '결제완료'부터 '서빙완료'까지의 모든 정상 주문 (취소 및 대기 제외) */ WHERE o.ordered_at >= #{targetDate} AND o.ordered_at < DATE_ADD(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND o.status NOT IN ('PENDING', 'CANCELLED') GROUP BY oi.menu_id, c.type
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, total_revenue as totalRevenue, order_count as orderCount, visit_count as visitCount, avg_usage_time as avgUsageTime FROM daily_sales_summary WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT m.name as menuName, ish.sales_qty as salesQty, ish.sales_amount as salesAmount FROM item_sales_history ish JOIN menu m ON ish.product_id = m.id WHERE ish.stat_date = #{targetDate} ORDER BY ish.sales_qty DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.name as menuName, SUM(ish.sales_qty) as salesQty FROM item_sales_history ish JOIN menu m ON ish.product_id = m.id WHERE ish.stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY ish.product_id, m.name ORDER BY salesQty DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT category as categoryName, SUM(sales_amount) as totalAmount FROM item_sales_history WHERE stat_date = #{targetDate} GROUP BY category
